temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a living room, Ross, wearing a pink plaid shirt, gestures with his hands as he explains something to Joey, who is off-screen. The credit 'EXECUTIVE PRODUCER SCOTT SILVERI' is superimposed over the scene. Ross looks slightly exasperated as he speaks. (Storyline: The scene begins in the middle of a conversation between Ross and Joey, establishing a point of contention or explanation from Ross's perspective.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Exasperated, slightly defensive. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to Joey, who is wearing a blue plaid shirt. He looks down with a frustrated expression, shaking his head slightly as he begins to speak. The credit 'CO-EXECUTIVE PRODUCER TODD STEVENS' is displayed on screen. (Storyline: The scene shifts to Joey's reaction, showing his frustration and disagreement with Ross's statement.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Frustrated, dismissive. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
